name: RunwayML Gen-4.5
description: RunwayML's video generation model supporting both text-to-video and image-to-video with customizable duration, aspect ratio, and content moderation controls.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing what should appear in the video

image_input.description: HTTPS URL, Runway URI, or data URI containing an image for image-to-video

ratio.description: Resolution/aspect ratio of the output video

public_figure_threshold.description: Content moderation strictness for public figures
